title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!
